nav.noChatsYet: No chats yet. Start a new chat!

toast.apiKeyNotConfigured: Please configure your API key in Settings to continue chatting.

runtimeConfig.syncError: Failed to sync the latest runtime settings. The local change was reverted.

sidebar.comingSoon: This feature is coming soon. Stay tuned!

channelChat.title: Telegram Threads
channelChat.activeStatusDescription: Current online thread. New Telegram messages continue here.
channelChat.archivedStatusDescription: Archived thread. It is read-only here and cannot continue chatting. Send /new in Telegram to start a new thread.
channelChat.noSessionsDescription: Send a Telegram message to this bot and threads will appear here.
channelChat.noMessagesDescription: Messages for the selected thread will appear here.

skills.title: Skills
skills.bundledSectionDescription: Installed with the app. These skills can be enabled or disabled.
skills.userSectionDescription: Installed by the user. These skills can be enabled, disabled, or uninstalled.
skills.uninstallError: Failed to uninstall the selected skill.
skills.toggleError: Failed to update the selected skill.

telegramWhitelist.title: Telegram Join Request
telegramWhitelist.description: A Telegram user is requesting whitelist access.
